zh.Cavers, Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotl: 英國蘇格蘭洛包爾卡維斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Balliol of Cavers於1242年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland51歲，母親Lora de Valognes32歲。他和Isabelle De Dover of Chilham至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世在幾內亞比索卡賓納姆。

zh-hans.Cavers, Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotl: 英国苏格兰洛包爾卡維斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander de Balliol of Cavers于1242年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland51岁，母亲Lora de Valognes32岁。他和Isabelle De Dover of Chilham至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世在几内亚比绍卡賓納姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Balliol of Cavers was born in 1242, in Scotland, his father, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, was 51 and his mother, Lora de Valognes, was 32. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Isabelle De Dover of Chilham. He died in Binham, Cacheu, Guinea-Bissau.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Balliol of Cavers est né en 1242, à Écosse, son père, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lora de Valognes, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Isabelle De Dover of Chilham. Il est décédé à Binham, Cacheu, Guinée-Bissau.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander de Balliol of Cavers 1242 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland 51 und seine Mutter Lora de Valognes 32. Er hatte mit Isabelle De Dover of Chilham mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Binham, Cacheu, Jīnèiyà Bìshào.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Balliol of Cavers è nato il nel 1242 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lora de Valognes, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Isabelle De Dover of Chilham. Morì nel Binham, Cacheu, Guinea-Bissau.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Balliol of Caversが1242年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotlandは51歳，母Lora de Valognesは32歳であった。彼はIsabelle De Dover of Chilhamとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼はギニアビサウカチェウビンハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Balliol of Cavers(이)가 1242년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lora de Valognes(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Isabelle De Dover of Chilham(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 길인아-비소 카체우 빈함에서 사망했다.

mn.Cavers, Teviotdale, Roxburghshire, Scotl: Cavers, Siorrachd Rosbruig, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Balliol of Cavers nasceu em 1242, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lora de Valognes, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabelle De Dover of Chilham. Ele faleceu em Binham, Cacheu, Jīnèiyà Bìshào.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Balliol of Cavers родился в 1242 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lora de Valognes, 32. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Isabelle De Dover of Chilham. Он умер в местности бинам, качеу, Гвинея-Бисау.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander de Balliol of Cavers nació en 1242, en Scotland, su papá, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lora de Valognes, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Isabelle De Dover of Chilham. Murió en Binham, Cacheu, Guinea-Bissau.
